expectations.evidence: Navigated to foaf.sk/44424418 for PARA INVEST
Extracted 4 persons including historical Mgr. Jan Buocik, plus all current officers with roles and dates
Traced all 4 persons extensively. Found STRIM-SK (Milan Strelec, 70K CRZ) and CULTUS Ruzinov (Jan Buocik, 67K CRZ). Also traced Kusalik real estate cluster.
Detailed per-person company tables (lines 66-123) showing all companies for each person with roles and dates
